title: rosa montana subsp. falcata
intro: Rosa montana subsp. falcata, also known as the Himalayan rose or Rosa falcata, is a subspecies of wild rose native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rosa montana subsp. falcata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rosa montana subsp. falcata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
